visa_types.overview:
Overview
A foreigner coming to Lithuania for seasonal work and holding a seasonal work permit for more than 90 days issued by the Lithuanian Employment Services.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A foreigner coming to Lithuania for seasonal work and holding a seasonal work permit for more than 90 days issued by the Lithuanian Employment Services.

## Visa Fees
Application fees applicable for May 2021::

[Table:
                                                                           Seasonal work
]
National Visa Fee for Belarus Citizen is 463 RMB (60 EUR).
Above mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid only by cash in RMB.

## Exemption of Visa Fee:
- Family members of a citizen of the European Union or a citizen of a Member State of the European Free Trade Association, where such family members are nationals of third countries,
                                                                            as well as to the family members of citizens of the Republic of Lithuania
- School pupils, students and accompanying teachers or lecturers who undertake trips for the purpose of study or educational training, on production of the documents attesting to this
                                                                            effect
- Researchers travelling within the European Union and the Member States of the European Free Trade Association for the purpose of carrying out scientific research, on production of
                                                                            the documents attesting to this effect
- Representatives of non-profit organizations aged 25 years or less participating in seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or educational events organized by non-profit organizations
                                                                            (short-stay visas)
- Children below 6 years on the date of submission
- Persons in respect of whom a decision to issue a residence permit in the Republic of Lithuania has been adopted (long-stay visas)

## Logistic Fee
Service Charge for Visa Application – 154 RMB per person 
The applicants under 12 years of age will be exempt from logistic fees.

## Additional Services
The services mentioned here are optional. To use them, you will need to pay an extra fee in addition to the Visa Fee and Logistic Fee. You must pay this extra fee when you attend the
                                                                        visa application centre only.
Courier Charge (optional) – 85 RMB per person 
Photography Charge (optional) – 45 RMB per person
Photocopy Charge (optional) – 2 RMB per page 
Printing Charge (optional) – 12 RMB per page
For Internet Kiosk (optional) – 50 RMB per 30 minutes
For SMS (optional) – 18 RMB per person
For Application Form Filling (optional) – 100 RMB per person 
For Passport Return Check (optional) - 75 RMB / Person in Beijing VAC; 125 RMB / Person- Satellite VACs
Note: You can also choose to have passports checked at Embassy.
Weekday Prime Time Submission (optional) – 350 RMB per person (Monday to Friday 16:00 to 18:00)
Weekday Prime Time Submission service will be available for customers at the additional charge of 350 RMB over and above the service fee. Customers could have flexible working hours extended
                                                                        and submit the visa application between 16:00 to 18:00 Customer is required to make appointment through visa application center mailbox for submission. 
Please kindly notice passport collection time is 8:00 to 15:00 on working days.
Weekday Extended Hours Passport Collection (optional) – 175 RMB per person (Monday to Friday 17:00 to 18:00)
 Weekday Extended Hours Passport Collection service will be available for customers at the additional charge of 175 RMB over and above the service fee. Customers could have flexible working
                                                                        hours extended and collect the passport between 17:00 to 18:00 Customer is required to make appointment through visa application center mailbox for submission.
Weekend Prime Time Submission (optional) – 380 RMB per person (Saturday 9:00 to 12:00)
 Weekend Prime Time Submission services will be available for customers at the additional charge of 380 RMB over and above the service fee. With a prior appointment by sending mail to
                                                                        Visa application center two working days before the scheduled submission date, customers could submit their visa application on Saturday between 09:00 to 12:00. 
Please kindly notice passport collection time is 8:00 to 15:00 on working days.
The selection of Value added Service does not indicate preferential treatment in issuing of visa by the Embassy or consulate.
Hub City Passport Collection (optional) – 25 RMB per person
This service is available for Individual applicant and ADS groups who submitted at the satellite VACs and wish to collect the passport at Hub City center (Beijing). This service is only
                                                                        for Beijing visa center.
 Apply from Home (optional) – 125 RMB per person
This service is available for biometrics exemption customers to mail in application to VACs. Customer may send an email to VAC mailbox to check if self could directly mail the documents.
On Demand Mobile Visa Service (optional)
The On Demand Mobile Visa Service enables you to lodge your visa application without leaving your home, office or school campus.
Our expert and professional staff with the specialized and authorized equipment; under the guidance of the Lithuania Embassy and the Consulates will visit and assist you throughout the
                                                                        Visa application at your Home, Office or School campus.
The On Demand Mobile Visa Service is offered across all the cities in the People’s Republic of China (Mainland) and the service fee is applicable in accordance with the group size, the
                                                                        location and the consent of the Lithuania Embassy.
Simply send us an email on infopek.itcn@vfshelpline.com (mailto:infopek.itcn@vfshelpline.com)                                                                        to register.
Please Note:
The applicable visa fee and logistic fee in RMB is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice. 

## Documents Required
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please
click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/chn/en/ltu/travel-insurance)

[Table:
                                                                           Seasonal work
]

## Photo Specifications
All photos must meet the requirements listed below. If these requirements have not been met, the applicant will have to deliver a new photo that meets the requirements. The photo requirements
                                                                        are the same for children as for adults.

## The Photo shall:
- be in sharp focus, clear and with good contrasts
- be printed on quality photo paper with high solution
- be in colours with a light background
- be 35*45 mm
- maximum 6 months old, resemble the applicant
- full-face, facing the camera directly, eyes looking straight at the camera
- show the whole head and the top of the shoulders. The face shall occupy 70-80 % of the picture
- show open eyes that are clearly visible. Hair shall not cover the eyes

## Regarding glasses:
Glasses are allowed as long as the eyes are clearly visible.
- the glasses cannot be coloured
- the rim must not cover any part of the eyes
- there cannot be reflection in the glasses

## Regarding head-dress:
Religious head-dresses are allowed provided that all details of the face are clearly shown.
- Chin, forehead and both cheeks shall all be clearly visible
- Shadows in the face due to the head-dress are not allowed

## Processing Time
Processing time is usually 14 days, but it depends on the documents and the goal of travel. For students and professors as well as LT citizens’ family members it’s usually
                                                                        14 days and less; for the applicants who are going to work, 14 and more if needed.
Please be noticed that the applications submitted in Visa Application Centre will be transited to Beijing Lithuania Embassy and the processing time will count since all requested documents
                                                                        received at Embassy excluding the delivery time. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of this application is required, for example, when you
                                                                        are requested to come to an interview or to submit additional documentation.

## Download Forms
Visa Form: The online visa application form is available at https://visa.vrm.lt/epm/ (https://visa.vrm.lt/epm/) , the application form should
                                                                        be filled–out online and the Visa online application form should be printed out. 

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

]

## Exemption of Visa Fee:
- Family members of a citizen of the European Union or a citizen of a Member State of the European Free Trade Association, where such family members are nationals of third countries,
                                                                            as well as to the family members of citizens of the Republic of Lithuania
- School pupils, students and accompanying teachers or lecturers who undertake trips for the purpose of study or educational training, on production of the documents attesting to this
                                                                            effect
- Researchers travelling within the European Union and the Member States of the European Free Trade Association for the purpose of carrying out scientific research, on production of
                                                                            the documents attesting to this effect
- Representatives of non-profit organizations aged 25 years or less participating in seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or educational events organized by non-profit organizations
                                                                            (short-stay visas)
- Children below 6 years on the date of submission
- Persons in respect of whom a decision to issue a residence permit in the Republic of Lithuania has been adopted (long-stay visas)

## Logistic Fee
Service Charge for Visa Application – 154 RMB per person 
The applicants under 12 years of age will be exempt from logistic fees.

## Additional Services
The services mentioned here are optional. To use them, you will need to pay an extra fee in addition to the Visa Fee and Logistic Fee. You must pay this extra fee when you attend the
                                                                        visa application centre only.
Courier Charge (optional) – 85 RMB per person 
Photography Charge (optional) – 45 RMB per person
Photocopy Charge (optional) – 2 RMB per page 
Printing Charge (optional) – 12 RMB per page
For Internet Kiosk (optional) – 50 RMB per 30 minutes
For SMS (optional) – 18 RMB per person
For Application Form Filling (optional) – 100 RMB per person 
For Passport Return Check (optional) - 75 RMB / Person in Beijing VAC; 125 RMB / Person- Satellite VACs
Note: You can also choose to have passports checked at Embassy.
Weekday Prime Time Submission (optional) – 350 RMB per person (Monday to Friday 16:00 to 18:00)
Weekday Prime Time Submission service will be available for customers at the additional charge of 350 RMB over and above the service fee. Customers could have flexible working hours extended
                                                                        and submit the visa application between 16:00 to 18:00 Customer is required to make appointment through visa application center mailbox for submission. 
Please kindly notice passport collection time is 8:00 to 15:00 on working days.
Weekday Extended Hours Passport Collection (optional) – 175 RMB per person (Monday to Friday 17:00 to 18:00)
 Weekday Extended Hours Passport Collection service will be available for customers at the additional charge of 175 RMB over and above the service fee. Customers could have flexible working
                                                                        hours extended and collect the passport between 17:00 to 18:00 Customer is required to make appointment through visa application center mailbox for submission.
Weekend Prime Time Submission (optional) – 380 RMB per person (Saturday 9:00 to 12:00)
 Weekend Prime Time Submission services will be available for customers at the additional charge of 380 RMB over and above the service fee. With a prior appointment by sending mail to
                                                                        Visa application center two working days before the scheduled submission date, customers could submit their visa application on Saturday between 09:00 to 12:00.

Hub City Passport Collection (optional) – 25 RMB per person
This service is available for Individual applicant and ADS groups who submitted at the satellite VACs and wish to collect the passport at Hub City center (Beijing). This service is only
                                                                        for Beijing visa center.
 Apply from Home (optional) – 125 RMB per person
This service is available for biometrics exemption customers to mail in application to VACs. Customer may send an email to VAC mailbox to check if self could directly mail the documents.
On Demand Mobile Visa Service (optional)
The On Demand Mobile Visa Service enables you to lodge your visa application without leaving your home, office or school campus.
Our expert and professional staff with the specialized and authorized equipment; under the guidance of the Lithuania Embassy and the Consulates will visit and assist you throughout the
                                                                        Visa application at your Home, Office or School campus.
The On Demand Mobile Visa Service is offered across all the cities in the People’s Republic of China (Mainland) and the service fee is applicable in accordance with the group size, the
                                                                        location and the consent of the Lithuania Embassy.
Simply send us an email on infopek.itcn@vfshelpline.com (mailto:infopek.itcn@vfshelpline.com)                                                                        to register.
Please Note:
The applicable visa fee and logistic fee in RMB is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.

## Documents Required
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/chn/en/ltu/travel-insurance)
Checklist for Seafarer (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3fW4bFb85i6CSRbwYfOOZP/6efcd3c75ada4a1cce698d2f6fb7220c/checklist-seafarer.pdf)

## Photo Specifications
All photos must meet the requirements listed below. If these requirements have not been met, the applicant will have to deliver a new photo that meets the requirements. The photo requirements
                                                                        are the same for children as for adults.

## The Photo shall:
- be in sharp focus, clear and with good contrasts
- be printed on quality photo paper with high solution
- be in colours with a light background
- be 35*45 mm
- maximum 6 months old, resemble the applicant
- full-face, facing the camera directly, eyes looking straight at the camera
- show the whole head and the top of the shoulders. The face shall occupy 70-80 % of the picture
- show open eyes that are clearly visible. Hair shall not cover the eyes

## Regarding glasses:
Glasses are allowed as long as the eyes are clearly visible.
- the glasses cannot be coloured
- the rim must not cover any part of the eyes
- there cannot be reflection in the glasses

## Regarding head-dress:
Religious head-dresses are allowed provided that all details of the face are clearly shown.
- Chin, forehead and both cheeks shall all be clearly visible
- Shadows in the face due to the head-dress are not allowed

## Processing Time
Processing time is usually 14 days, but it depends on the documents and the goal of travel. For students and professors as well as LT citizens’ family members it’s usually 14 days and less; for the applicants who are going to work, 14 and more if needed.
Please be noticed that the applications submitted in Visa Application Centre will be transited to Beijing Lithuania Embassy and the processing time will count since all requested documents received at Embassy excluding the delivery time. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of this application is required, for example, when you are requested to come to an interview or to submit additional documentation.

                                                                        should be filled–out online and the Visa online application form should be printed out. 

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.name: Schengen Visa Types
visa_types.overview:
If you are planning a short visit to Lithuania, you may need to apply for a Schengen visa. Lithuania is one of the 26 European countries forming the Schengen Area which have no border controls between
                                                            them. These countries also issue an uniform visa, the Schengen visa for the stay upto 90 days within 180 days.
Schengen countries: Austria, Belgium, the Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Iceland, Italy, Latvia, Liechtenstein, Lithuania, Luxembourg,
                                                            Malta, The Netherlands, Norway, Poland, Portugal, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden, and Switzerland.

## Overview
A foreigner coming to Lithuania for work and having a profession included in the list of professions lacking in Lithuania approved by the Director of Employment Services by kind of economic
                                                                        activity.

## Visa Fees
Application fees applicable for May 2021::

[Table:
                                                                           Professions
]
National Visa Fee for Belarus Citizen is 463 RMB (60 EUR).
Above mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid only by cash in RMB.

## Exemption of Visa Fee:
- Family members of a citizen of the European Union or a citizen of a Member State of the European Free Trade Association, where such family members are nationals of third countries,
                                                                            as well as to the family members of citizens of the Republic of Lithuania
- School pupils, students and accompanying teachers or lecturers who undertake trips for the purpose of study or educational training, on production of the documents attesting to this
                                                                            effect
- Researchers travelling within the European Union and the Member States of the European Free Trade Association for the purpose of carrying out scientific research, on production of
                                                                            the documents attesting to this effect
- Representatives of non-profit organizations aged 25 years or less participating in seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or educational events organized by non-profit organizations
                                                                            (short-stay visas)
- Children below 6 years on the date of submission
- Persons in respect of whom a decision to issue a residence permit in the Republic of Lithuania has been adopted (long-stay visas)

## Logistic Fee
Service Charge for Visa Application – 154 RMB per person 
The applicants under 12 years of age will be exempt from logistic fees.

The services mentioned here are optional. To use them, you will need to pay an extra fee in addition to the Visa Fee and Logistic Fee. You must pay this extra fee when you attend the
                                                                        visa application centre only.
Courier Charge (optional) – 85 RMB per person 
Photography Charge (optional) – 45 RMB per person
Photocopy Charge (optional) – 2 RMB per page 
Printing Charge (optional) – 12 RMB per page
For Internet Kiosk (optional) – 50 RMB per 30 minutes
For SMS (optional) – 18 RMB per person
For Application Form Filling (optional) – 100 RMB per person 
For Passport Return Check (optional) - 75 RMB / Person in Beijing VAC; 125 RMB / Person- Satellite VACs
Note: You can also choose to have passports checked at Embassy.
Weekday Prime Time Submission (optional) – 350 RMB per person (Monday to Friday 16:00 to 18:00)
Weekday Prime Time Submission service will be available for customers at the additional charge of 350 RMB over and above the service fee. Customers could have flexible working hours extended
                                                                        and submit the visa application between 16:00 to 18:00 Customer is required to make appointment through visa application center mailbox for submission. 
Please kindly notice passport collection time is 8:00 to 15:00 on working days.

 Weekday Extended Hours Passport Collection service will be available for customers at the additional charge of 175 RMB over and above the service fee. Customers could have flexible working
                                                                        hours extended and collect the passport between 17:00 to 18:00 Customer is required to make appointment through visa application center mailbox for submission.

 Weekend Prime Time Submission services will be available for customers at the additional charge of 380 RMB over and above the service fee. With a prior appointment by sending mail to
                                                                        Visa application center two working days before the scheduled submission date, customers could submit their visa application on Saturday between 09:00 to 12:00. 
Please kindly notice passport collection time is 8:00 to 15:00 on working days.

This service is available for biometrics exemption customers to mail in application to VACs. Customer may send an email to VAC mailbox to check if self could directly mail the documents.

The On Demand Mobile Visa Service enables you to lodge your visa application without leaving your home, office or school campus.

Overview
A foreigner coming to Lithuania to pursue joint government programs with a foreigner country as a lecture or a researcher, or a family member accompanying such a foreigner.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A foreigner coming to Lithuania to pursue joint government programs with a foreigner country as a lecture or a researcher, or a family member accompanying such a foreigner.

## Visa Fees
Application fees applicable for May 2021::

[Table:   Government program]
National Visa Fee for Belarus Citizen is 463 RMB (60 EUR).
Above mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid only by cash in RMB.

## Exemption of Visa Fee:
- Family members of a citizen of the European Union or a citizen of a Member State of the European Free Trade Association, where such family members are nationals of third countries,
                                                                            as well as to the family members of citizens of the Republic of Lithuania
- School pupils, students and accompanying teachers or lecturers who undertake trips for the purpose of study or educational training, on production of the documents attesting to this
                                                                            effect
- Researchers travelling within the European Union and the Member States of the European Free Trade Association for the purpose of carrying out scientific research, on production of
                                                                            the documents attesting to this effect
- Representatives of non-profit organizations aged 25 years or less participating in seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or educational events organized by non-profit organizations
                                                                            (short-stay visas)
- Children below 6 years on the date of submission
- Persons in respect of whom a decision to issue a residence permit in the Republic of Lithuania has been adopted (long-stay visas)

## Logistic Fee
Service Charge for Visa Application – 154 RMB per person 
The applicants under 12 years of age will be exempt from logistic fees.

## Additional Services
The services mentioned here are optional. To use them, you will need to pay an extra fee in addition to the Visa Fee and Logistic Fee. You must pay this extra fee when you attend the
                                                                        visa application centre only.
Courier Charge (optional) – 85 RMB per person 
Photography Charge (optional) – 45 RMB per person
Photocopy Charge (optional) – 2 RMB per page 
Printing Charge (optional) – 12 RMB per page
For Internet Kiosk (optional) – 50 RMB per 30 minutes
For SMS (optional) – 18 RMB per person
For Application Form Filling (optional) – 100 RMB per person 
For Passport Return Check (optional) - 75 RMB / Person in Beijing VAC; 125 RMB / Person- Satellite VACs
Note: You can also choose to have passports checked at Embassy.
Weekday Prime Time Submission (optional) – 350 RMB per person (Monday to Friday 16:00 to 18:00)
Weekday Prime Time Submission service will be available for customers at the additional charge of 350 RMB over and above the service fee. Customers could have flexible working hours extended
                                                                        and submit the visa application between 16:00 to 18:00 Customer is required to make appointment through visa application center mailbox for submission. 
Please kindly notice passport collection time is 8:00 to 15:00 on working days.
Weekday Extended Hours Passport Collection (optional) – 175 RMB per person (Monday to Friday 17:00 to 18:00)
 Weekday Extended Hours Passport Collection service will be available for customers at the additional charge of 175 RMB over and above the service fee. Customers could have flexible working
                                                                        hours extended and collect the passport between 17:00 to 18:00 Customer is required to make appointment through visa application center mailbox for submission.
Weekend Prime Time Submission (optional) – 380 RMB per person (Saturday 9:00 to 12:00)
 Weekend Prime Time Submission services will be available for customers at the additional charge of 380 RMB over and above the service fee. With a prior appointment by sending mail to
                                                                        Visa application center two working days before the scheduled submission date, customers could submit their visa application on Saturday between 09:00 to 12:00. 
Please kindly notice passport collection time is 8:00 to 15:00 on working days.
The selection of Value added Service does not indicate preferential treatment in issuing of visa by the Embassy or consulate.
Hub City Passport Collection (optional) – 25 RMB per person
This service is available for Individual applicant and ADS groups who submitted at the satellite VACs and wish to collect the passport at Hub City center (Beijing). This service is only
                                                                        for Beijing visa center.
 Apply from Home (optional) – 125 RMB per person
This service is available for biometrics exemption customers to mail in application to VACs. Customer may send an email to VAC mailbox to check if self could directly mail the documents.
On Demand Mobile Visa Service (optional)
The On Demand Mobile Visa Service enables you to lodge your visa application without leaving your home, office or school campus.
Our expert and professional staff with the specialized and authorized equipment; under the guidance of the Lithuania Embassy and the Consulates will visit and assist you throughout the
                                                                        Visa application at your Home, Office or School campus.
The On Demand Mobile Visa Service is offered across all the cities in the People’s Republic of China (Mainland) and the service fee is applicable in accordance with the group size, the
                                                                        location and the consent of the Lithuania Embassy.
Simply send us an email on infopek.itcn@vfshelpline.com (mailto:infopek.itcn@vfshelpline.com)                                                                        to register.
Please Note:
The applicable visa fee and logistic fee in RMB is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.

## Documents Required
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/chn/en/ltu/travel-insurance)
Checklist for Government program (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/590ypaKsNp5hrGnCKOmdaM/b6893d73d97330ab2d1136af5d776154/checklist-government-program.pdf)

## Photo Specifications
All photos must meet the requirements listed below. If these requirements have not been met, the applicant will have to deliver a new photo that meets the requirements. The photo requirements
                                                                        are the same for children as for adults.

## The Photo shall:
- be in sharp focus, clear and with good contrasts
- be printed on quality photo paper with high solution
- be in colours with a light background
- be 35*45 mm
- maximum 6 months old, resemble the applicant
- full-face, facing the camera directly, eyes looking straight at the camera
- show the whole head and the top of the shoulders. The face shall occupy 70-80 % of the picture
- show open eyes that are clearly visible. Hair shall not cover the eyes

## Regarding glasses:
Glasses are allowed as long as the eyes are clearly visible.
- the glasses cannot be coloured
- the rim must not cover any part of the eyes
- there cannot be reflection in the glasses

## Regarding head-dress:
Religious head-dresses are allowed provided that all details of the face are clearly shown.
- Chin, forehead and both cheeks shall all be clearly visible
- Shadows in the face due to the head-dress are not allowed

## Processing Time
Processing time is usually 14 days, but it depends on the documents and the goal of travel. For students and professors as well as LT citizens’ family members it’s usually 14 days and less; for the applicants who are going to work, 14 and more if needed.
Please be noticed that the applications submitted in Visa Application Centre will be transited to Beijing Lithuania Embassy and the processing time will count since all requested documents received at Embassy excluding the delivery time. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of this application is required, for example, when you are requested to come to an interview or to submit additional documentation.

## Download Forms
Visa Form: The online visa application form is available at https://visa.vrm.lt/epm/  (https://visa.vrm.lt/epm/), the application form
                                                                        should be filled–out online and the Visa online application form should be printed out. 

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
A foreigner who arrives to Lithuania to engage in legal activities and is a participant of a private legal entity registered in the Register of Legal Entities (hereinafter referred to
                                                                        as the “company”) and established not earlier than 1 year before the date of submission of the application for national visa, as defined by the Civil Code of Lithuania (hereinafter
                                                                        referred to as the “participant”) if the size of the company’s equity capital (in the case of non-public limited companies and non-private limited companies – assets) is at least
                                                                        EUR 28,000 of which at least EUR 14,000 are funds or other assets invested by the person or is the manager of a company established not earlier than 1 year before the date of submission
                                                                        of the application for national visa, the size of the company’s equity capital (in the case of a non-stock company or private limited company – assets) being at least EUR 28,000,
                                                                        and the purpose of his or her arrival is work at that particular company.

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A foreigner in respect of whom a decision to issue a residence permit in Lithuania has been adopted or who lost a residence permit abroad.

## Visa Fees
Application fees applicable for May 2021::

[Table:
                                                                           Approved migration
]
National Visa Fee for Belarus Citizen is 463 RMB (60 EUR).
Above mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid only by cash in RMB.

## Exemption of Visa Fee:
- Family members of a citizen of the European Union or a citizen of a Member State of the European Free Trade Association, where such family members are nationals of third countries,
                                                                            as well as to the family members of citizens of the Republic of Lithuania
- School pupils, students and accompanying teachers or lecturers who undertake trips for the purpose of study or educational training, on production of the documents attesting to this
                                                                            effect
- Researchers travelling within the European Union and the Member States of the European Free Trade Association for the purpose of carrying out scientific research, on production of
                                                                            the documents attesting to this effect
- Representatives of non-profit organizations aged 25 years or less participating in seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or educational events organized by non-profit organizations
                                                                            (short-stay visas)
- Children below 6 years on the date of submission
- Persons in respect of whom a decision to issue a residence permit in the Republic of Lithuania has been adopted (long-stay visas)

## Logistic Fee
Service Charge for Visa Application – 154 RMB per person 
The applicants under 12 years of age will be exempt from logistic fees.

## Additional Services
The services mentioned here are optional. To use them, you will need to pay an extra fee in addition to the Visa Fee and Logistic Fee. You must pay this extra fee when you attend the
                                                                        visa application centre only.
Courier Charge (optional) – 85 RMB per person 
Photography Charge (optional) – 45 RMB per person
Photocopy Charge (optional) – 2 RMB per page 
Printing Charge (optional) – 12 RMB per page
For Internet Kiosk (optional) – 50 RMB per 30 minutes
For SMS (optional) – 18 RMB per person
For Application Form Filling (optional) – 100 RMB per person 
For Passport Return Check (optional) - 75 RMB / Person in Beijing VAC; 125 RMB / Person- Satellite VACs
Note: You can also choose to have passports checked at Embassy.
Weekday Prime Time Submission (optional) – 350 RMB per person (Monday to Friday 16:00 to 18:00)
Weekday Prime Time Submission service will be available for customers at the additional charge of 350 RMB over and above the service fee. Customers could have flexible working hours extended
                                                                        and submit the visa application between 16:00 to 18:00 Customer is required to make appointment through visa application center mailbox for submission. 
Please kindly notice passport collection time is 8:00 to 15:00 on working days.
Weekday Extended Hours Passport Collection (optional) – 175 RMB per person (Monday to Friday 17:00 to 18:00)
 Weekday Extended Hours Passport Collection service will be available for customers at the additional charge of 175 RMB over and above the service fee. Customers could have flexible working
                                                                        hours extended and collect the passport between 17:00 to 18:00 Customer is required to make appointment through visa application center mailbox for submission.
Weekend Prime Time Submission (optional) – 380 RMB per person (Saturday 9:00 to 12:00)
 Weekend Prime Time Submission services will be available for customers at the additional charge of 380 RMB over and above the service fee. With a prior appointment by sending mail to
                                                                        Visa application center two working days before the scheduled submission date, customers could submit their visa application on Saturday between 09:00 to 12:00. 
Please kindly notice passport collection time is 8:00 to 15:00 on working days.
The selection of Value added Service does not indicate preferential treatment in issuing of visa by the Embassy or consulate.
Hub City Passport Collection (optional) – 25 RMB per person
This service is available for Individual applicant and ADS groups who submitted at the satellite VACs and wish to collect the passport at Hub City center (Beijing). This service is only
                                                                        for Beijing visa center.
 Apply from Home (optional) – 125 RMB per person
This service is available for biometrics exemption customers to mail in application to VACs. Customer may send an email to VAC mailbox to check if self could directly mail the documents.
On Demand Mobile Visa Service (optional)
The On Demand Mobile Visa Service enables you to lodge your visa application without leaving your home, office or school campus.
Our expert and professional staff with the specialized and authorized equipment; under the guidance of the Lithuania Embassy and the Consulates will visit and assist you throughout the
                                                                        Visa application at your Home, Office or School campus.
The On Demand Mobile Visa Service is offered across all the cities in the People’s Republic of China (Mainland) and the service fee is applicable in accordance with the group size, the
                                                                        location and the consent of the Lithuania Embassy.
Simply send us an email on infopek.itcn@vfshelpline.com (mailto:infopek.itcn@vfshelpline.com)                                                                        to register.
Please Note:
The applicable visa fee and logistic fee in RMB is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.

## Documents Required
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/chn/en/ltu/travel-insurance)
Checklist for Approved migration (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5qmW2E9jJ8FUZOKOPtFUoT/da757b17870dd1b22f2131992f4171a7/checklist-for-approved-migration.pdf)

## Photo Specifications
All photos must meet the requirements listed below. If these requirements have not been met, the applicant will have to deliver a new photo that meets the requirements. The photo requirements
                                                                        are the same for children as for adults.

## The Photo shall:
- be in sharp focus, clear and with good contrasts
- be printed on quality photo paper with high solution
- be in colours with a light background
- be 35*45 mm
- maximum 6 months old, resemble the applicant
- full-face, facing the camera directly, eyes looking straight at the camera
- show the whole head and the top of the shoulders. The face shall occupy 70-80 % of the picture
- show open eyes that are clearly visible. Hair shall not cover the eyes

## Regarding glasses:
Glasses are allowed as long as the eyes are clearly visible.
- the glasses cannot be coloured
- the rim must not cover any part of the eyes
- there cannot be reflection in the glasses

## Regarding head-dress:
Religious head-dresses are allowed provided that all details of the face are clearly shown.
- Chin, forehead and both cheeks shall all be clearly visible
- Shadows in the face due to the head-dress are not allowed

Processing time is usually 14 days, but it depends on the documents and the goal of travel. For students and professors as well as LT citizens’ family members it’s usually 14 days and less; for the applicants who are going to work, 14 and more if needed.
Please be noticed that the applications submitted in Visa Application Centre will be transited to Beijing Lithuania Embassy and the processing time will count since all requested documents received at Embassy excluding the delivery time. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of this application is required, for example, when you are requested to come to an interview or to submit additional documentation.

Checklist for Research (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2Y2bNka98Veph2WMwIBluP/e5dff16c502b91c9cd0d0a4ef3d83662/checklist-research.pdf)

                                                                        are the same for children as for adults.

## The Photo shall:
- be in sharp focus, clear and with good contrasts
- be printed on quality photo paper with high solution
- be in colours with a light background
- be 35*45 mm
- maximum 6 months old, resemble the applicant
- full-face, facing the camera directly, eyes looking straight at the camera
- show the whole head and the top of the shoulders. The face shall occupy 70-80 % of the picture
- show open eyes that are clearly visible. Hair shall not cover the eyes

## Regarding glasses:
Glasses are allowed as long as the eyes are clearly visible.
- the glasses cannot be coloured
- the rim must not cover any part of the eyes
- there cannot be reflection in the glasses

## Regarding head-dress:
Religious head-dresses are allowed provided that all details of the face are clearly shown.
- Chin, forehead and both cheeks shall all be clearly visible
- Shadows in the face due to the head-dress are not allowed

## Photo Specifications
All photos must meet the requirements listed below. If these requirements have not been met, the applicant will have to deliver a new photo that meets the requirements. The photo requirements
                                                                        are the same for children as for adults.

## The Photo shall:
- be in sharp focus, clear and with good contrasts
- be printed on quality photo paper with high solution
- be in colours with a light background
- be 35*45 mm
- maximum 6 months old, resemble the applicant
- full-face, facing the camera directly, eyes looking straight at the camera
- show the whole head and the top of the shoulders. The face shall occupy 70-80 % of the picture
- show open eyes that are clearly visible. Hair shall not cover the eyes

## Regarding glasses:
Glasses are allowed as long as the eyes are clearly visible.
- the glasses cannot be coloured
- the rim must not cover any part of the eyes
- there cannot be reflection in the glasses

## Regarding head-dress:
Religious head-dresses are allowed provided that all details of the face are clearly shown.
- Chin, forehead and both cheeks shall all be clearly visible
- Shadows in the face due to the head-dress are not allowed

## Processing Time
Processing time is usually 14 days, but it depends on the documents and the goal of travel. For students and professors as well as LT citizens’ family members it’s usually 14 days and less; for the applicants who are going to work, 14 and more if needed.
Please be noticed that the applications submitted in Visa Application Centre will be transited to Beijing Lithuania Embassy and the processing time will count since all requested documents received at Embassy excluding the delivery time. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of this application is required, for example, when you are requested to come to an interview or to submit additional documentation.

## Download Forms
Visa Form: The online visa application form is available at https://visa.vrm.lt/epm/  (https://visa.vrm.lt/epm/), the application form
                                                                        should be filled–out online and the Visa online application form should be printed out. 

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
